title: Senior Programmer — VI-ROSE ITS Robotics Team
description: Architect robotic control systems and motion-planning applications for national dance robot competitions. Engineer the full firmware stack — hardware-software integration, real-time control loops, and a custom motion app — leading the team to 1st Place at both Regional and National levels (KRSTI 2024).
highlights: Architected real-time robotic control system with precise motion planning
Built a custom user-centric app for robot motion configuration
Optimized firmware performance through targeted troubleshooting

title: Laboratory Assistant & Practicum Assistant
description: Dual role: Lab Assistant managing resources and facilitating robotics/embedded systems research, and Practicum Assistant for Digital Circuit and Telematics Workshop courses across three academic terms.
highlights: Mentored 100+ students in digital logic, Boolean optimization, and sequential circuit design
Led workshops on soldering, PCB design, 3D printing, and embedded firmware
Served as Digital Circuit Practicum Assistant and Telematics Workshop Assistant across 3 consecutive terms

title: Programming Practicum Assistant
description: Mentored students in foundational C programming concepts. Collaborated on designing lab exercises to improve algorithmic thinking and logical problem-solving for first-year engineering students.
highlights: Mentored students in foundational C programming and algorithmic thinking
Supported students in debugging and understanding memory management in C

title: B.Sc. Computer Engineering
description: Undergraduate Computer Engineering student with a strong focus on embedded systems, digital circuits, and robotics. Active member and Senior Programmer of the VI-ROSE robotics competition team.
highlights: Senior Programmer — VI-ROSE ITS national competition robotics team
Laboratory Assistant — B401 Robotics Laboratory
Relevant coursework: Digital Systems, Embedded Programming, Robotics, Data Structures, IoT

title: 1st Place — National Indonesian Dance Robot Contest
description: Secured 1st Place at the National level of KRSTI 2024 as Senior Programmer of VI-ROSE ITS. Responsible for the full robotics firmware stack, motion-planning system, and real-time control architecture.
highlights: Competed against top university robotics teams across Indonesia
Sole programmer responsible for all motion and control firmware
Robot executed complex choreography with zero critical failures

title: 1st Place — Regional Indonesian Dance Robot Contest
description: Won 1st Place at the Regional (East Java) level of KRSTI 2024, qualifying VI-ROSE ITS for the national stage with a robust and precise firmware system.
highlights: Qualified the team for the national competition
Optimized motion precision and system reliability under competition pressure
First major competition win as Senior Programmer of the team

title: Legacy JavaScript Algorithms & Data Structures
description: Completed the full JavaScript Algorithms and Data Structures certification covering ES6+, functional programming, OOP, and 300+ algorithm challenges.
highlights: Covered ES6+, functional programming, and object-oriented JavaScript
Representing aproximately 300 hours of work
Verified: freecodecamp.org/certification/fawzqi/javascript-algorithms-and-data-structures-v8
